category_title: Elementary English language learners using gesture to mediate mathematical meaning-making
scenario_title: Explaining reasoning for a math answer at the desk
minimal_context: Liliana is working at her desk on a paper and pencil math activity using a data chart titled 'Hands and Fingers'.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's look at the data chart on your paper. Can you identify the title of the problem?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Looks at the chart but is unable to recognize and state the title)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's move on to answering the math problem itself. What is your answer?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Puts LH palm up, fingers extended, over the paper on the desk with the RH holding the pencil. Looks at palm of hand with fingers extended) One.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You have to be able to explain to me why you said that.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Shrugs shoulders up and down, with LH still up in the air with elbow resting on desk. Looks at hand, LH palm rotated out over desk and then opens palm towards her face) Because the number... mmmm, I don’t know.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Let's look at the data chart on your paper. Can you identify the title of the problem?

STUDENT: (Looks at the chart but is unable to recognize and state the title)

TUTOR: Let's move on to answering the math problem itself. What is your answer?

STUDENT: (Puts LH palm up, fingers extended, over the paper on the desk with the RH holding the pencil. Looks at palm of hand with fingers extended) One.

TUTOR: You have to be able to explain to me why you said that.

STUDENT: (Shrugs shoulders up and down, with LH still up in the air with elbow resting on desk. Looks at hand, LH palm rotated out over desk and then opens palm towards her face) Because the number... mmmm, I don’t know.

task.content: math problem using a data chart titled “Hands and Fingers”
task.learning_goal: explain the reasoning behind a math answer

context.materials: paper and pencil activity answering questions from the whiteboard
context.social_setting: one-on-one interaction between Mrs. Dee and Liliana

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: Attempting to explain the reasoning behind a math answer at her desk
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Shrugs shoulders up and down, with LH still up in the air with elbow resting on desk
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: uncertainty or difficulty in verbalizing the explanation

behavior_patterns.condition: At the beginning of the interaction, Mrs. Dee asked Liliana to identify the title of the problem
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: unable to recognize and state it
